description_long: This is a rectangular carton package with a predominantly white background, featuring the Dos Pinos brand and the product name 'inline 0% grasa leche descremada' (skimmed milk) in blue and red text. The front and back panels display delicate daisy flower illustrations and a splash of milk graphic, giving it a fresh and clean appearance. The top of the carton has a white plastic screw cap for pouring, positioned off-center. One side of the carton contains detailed instructions and recycling information, while the other side displays a nutritional information panel. The packaging is sleek and modern, with soft blue and yellow accents complementing the white base. The overall design suggests a dairy product, specifically skimmed milk, rather than juice.
description: A white rectangular carton with blue and yellow accents, daisy illustrations, and a white screw cap, labeled as Dos Pinos skimmed milk. The packaging is clean, modern, and features nutritional and recycling information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Dos Pinos brand, product name, daisy illustrations, and a splash of milk graphic.
description_view_1: Side view with instructions, recycling information, and a partial view of the screw cap.
description_view_2: Back view with English product labeling, daisy illustrations, and a splash of milk graphic.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the nutritional information panel and recycling details, with the screw cap visible.
